intent: Implement real LLM inference for Google Gemini and OpenAI providers, replacing the dev stubs with working API integrations that follow the established Anthropic pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Google provider makes real HTTP calls to generativelanguage.googleapis.com via network adapter
OpenAI provider makes real HTTP calls to api.openai.com via network adapter
Both providers retrieve API keys from SecretStore via secrets adapter
Both providers return LlmInferResult (content, model_id, usage) — no stub field
Both providers are registered in CLI buildHandlerMap() and desktop buildDesktopHandlerMap()
All existing tests continue to pass
